abilities.name: Pigcharge
abilities.description: May perform (2) Charge Action as (1) Action.

abilities.name: Puny
abilities.description: Has -1 Wounds and cannot make Disengaging Strikes.

abilities.name: Set Er Off
abilities.description: At start of turn during Dramatic Time, if not engaged or within 2 yards of friendly without this Ability, must declare Charge vs closest legal non-Pig target.

actions: (1) Ram (Pugilism) | AV: 3 (7) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage. As part of Charge, +1 per yard moved before attack. Must declare Trigger. Ram Stampede: After damaging, must declare Charge vs closest non-Pig not engaged. Crow Eat Anything: After damaging Living/Undead, heal 1. Tome Grab On: Target gains Clamped On +1 (-1 Walk, -2 Charge, +1 damage). Mask Bowled Over: Target TN 10 Acrobatics or Prone.
system.notes: Baby pigs that grow into adults. Easier to train than adults. Raised as pets by Gremlins. Useful self-defense but can't be left unsupervised. Follow mothers in wild.
